error.generic: A apărut o eroare. Vă rugăm să încercați din nou.

items.count: {count, plural, one {# element} few {# elemente} other {# de elemente}}

users_screen.title: Users & roles
users_screen.no_users_body: Try selecting a different role or invite someone new to this workspace.
users_screen.role_permissions_description: What each role can do across modules. Edit by clicking a cell.
users_screen.invite_help: They'll receive an email with a magic link. The link expires in 7 days.
users_screen.invalid_invite: Enter an email address and select a role before sending the invitation.
users_screen.load_error: Users could not be loaded. Try refreshing the settings users page.
users_screen.permission_denied: Permission denied: settings.users.view or settings.users.invite is required to view users and roles.
users_screen.role_assignment_unavailable: Role assignment requires the settings.roles.assign action and is not yet wired from this screen.

security_screen.title: Security
security_screen.subtitle: Authentication, session, and password policy.
security_screen.enforce_admins_hint: Admin accounts must use an authenticator app.
security_screen.password_expires_hint: Force rotation every N days. Not recommended by NIST.
security_screen.block_reuse: Block reuse of last N passwords
security_screen.enforce_sso_hint: Password login disabled for non-admin users when on.
security_screen.ip_allowlist_hint: Restrict admin login to specific IPs or ranges.
security_screen.add_ip_range_help: Add a CIDR range for administrator sign-in.
security_screen.permission_denied: You do not have permission to manage security settings.

authorization.auditReasonPlaceholder: Describe why these authorization settings are changing
authorization.approvalPermissionHint: Fixed permission string used by the Technical gate.
authorization.approverRolesHint: Roles selected by the authorization policy row.
authorization.authorizePermissionHint: Fixed permission string required to approve a request.
authorization.authorizedRolesHint: Roles selected by T-126 policy data.
authorization.blockerApproverRoleMissing: Select at least one approver role
authorization.blockerAuthorizerRoleMissing: Select at least one authorized role
authorization.blockerGateRuleMissing: Technical approval gate rule is missing
authorization.blockerMinApproversInvalid: Minimum approvers must be at least 1
authorization.blockerRequiresNewVersionRequired: requires_new_version must remain true for released-product edits
authorization.blockerSelfAuthorization: Requester and authorizer must be different users
authorization.errorBody: Authorization policies could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.
authorization.invariantBanner: Authorized edits always create a new BOM/product-spec version; in-place mutation is never allowed. Factory-use approval remains locked until Technical signs off.
authorization.minimumAuthorizersHint: T-126 validates blockers and segregation of duties on save.
authorization.missingSeedBody: Required org_authorization_policies rows are absent. Seed these policy codes before editing settings:
authorization.npdDescription: Authorizes released product/BOM edit requests after NPD release.
authorization.pageSubtitle: Control who can request released product/BOM edits and technical approval gates.
authorization.readOnlyNotice: Read-only: settings.authorization.edit is required to change authorization policies.
authorization.requestPermissionHint: Fixed permission string used by workflows.
authorization.technicalDescription: Blocks production/factory use until Technical approval is recorded.

manufacturing_operations.title: Operațiuni de producție
manufacturing_operations.subtitle: Configurați nume de operațiuni pe tenant, sufixe de proces, seturi seed pe industrie, starea activă și ordinea rețetei.
manufacturing_operations.notice: Operațiunile sunt referite de rute, alocări de linii și generatoare de coduri WIP. Sufixul procesului este imuabil după creare.
manufacturing_operations.error: Operațiunile de producție nu au putut fi încărcate.
manufacturing_operations.permission_denied: Nu aveți permisiunea de a gestiona operațiuni de producție.
manufacturing_operations.empty: Nicio operațiune de producție nu corespunde filtrelor curente.
manufacturing_operations.reset_dialog_title: Resetează la date seed de industrie
manufacturing_operations.reset_dialog_body: Aceasta va înlocui operațiunile curente cu datele seed ale industriei selectate. Ordinea, sufixele și rândurile inactive vor fi resetate.

company_profile.title: Company profile
company_profile.subtitle: Your company details, used across labels, invoices, and exports.
company_profile.empty: No organization profile is available for the current org.
company_profile.load_error: Company profile could not be loaded.
company_profile.save_error: Company profile could not be saved.
company_profile.read_only_notice: You need settings.org.update to save company profile changes.
